strategy: Azteca Twin Giants dungeon boss (18,670 health), so run it as a team: hitter, blading supports, and a healer.
Chip Belloq with a wand every single round you are setting up — if he takes no damage in a round he interrupt-casts a free Ra for ~1,460-1,520 Balance on the whole team.
Attack with Myth, Life, or Death (he takes +30% from all three); never hit into his 80% Balance resist without a prism.
Use direct damage, not DoTs — his minion Triages damage-over-time off him.
Stack blades and Feints on the hitter while keeping constant chip damage on Belloq, then commit one big boosted-school hit.
cheatNotes: If Belloq takes no damage during a round, next round he interrupt-casts a free 0-pip Ra for ~1,460-1,520 Balance on the whole team. Keep a wand hit on him every setup round so he never gets the trigger.
Damage-over-time spells on Belloq get Triaged off by his minion — use direct damage instead of DoTs.
